name: KS_RecipeCost
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[KS_RecipeCost]
    @MainItemCode NVARCHAR(255),
    @ALLTOTAL NVARCHAR(50) OUTPUT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @CARD_TYPE NVARCHAR(50)
    DECLARE @SUB_ITEMS_REF INT
    DECLARE @SUB_AMNT DECIMAL(18,2)
    DECLARE @UNIT_PRICE DECIMAL(18,2)
    DECLARE @TOTAL DECIMAL(18,2)
    DECLARE @TOTAL_TEMP DECIMAL(18,2)
    DECLARE @TOTAL_TEMP_2 DECIMAL(18,2)

    DECLARE MY_CURSOR CURSOR 
      LOCAL STATIC READ_ONLY FORWARD_ONLY
    FOR 
    
SELECT 
	CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'TM'
		  WHEN 10 THEN 'HM'
		  WHEN 11 THEN 'YM'
		  WHEN 12 THEN 'MM'
		  WHEN 13 THEN 'TK'
		  WHEN 4 THEN 'SK'
	ELSE '' END AS CARD_TYPE,
	ISNULL(case when ITM.CARDTYPE IN (11,12) THEN ITM.LOGICALREF END ,0) SUB_ITEMS_REF ,
	(CASE WHEN UNTA.CONVFACT1 = 0 THEN (STL.AMNT * (UNTA.CONVFACT2)) ELSE (STL.AMNT * (UNTA.CONVFACT2 / UNTA.CONVFACT1 )) END) AS SUB_AMNT,
		CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) UNIT_PRICE,
		(CASE WHEN UNTA.CONVFACT1 = 0 THEN (STL.AMNT * (UNTA.CONVFACT2)) ELSE (STL.AMNT * (UNTA.CONVFACT2 / UNTA.CONVFACT1 )) END) *
		CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float) TOTAL

	FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN  STL  
	left outer JOIN LG_123_ITMCLSAS ITC ON ITC.LOGICALREF=STL.STCREF
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS ITMM ON ITMM.LOGICALREF=STL.MAINCREF and Itmm.CARDTYPE=12
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS ITM ON ITM.LOGICALREF=STL.STCREF
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNL ON UNL.LOGICALREF=STL.UOMREF
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITMUNITA UNTA ON UNTA.ITEMREF = ITM.LOGICALREF AND STL.UOMREF = UNTA.UNITLINEREF
	WHERE STL.COMPTYPE=0 AND ITMM.ACTIVE=0 AND ITM.ACTIVE=0  AND ITMM.CODE=@MainItemCode
	ORDER BY SUB_ITEMS_REF

    OPEN MY_CURSOR
	
	SET @TOTAL_TEMP = 0
	SET @ALLTOTAL = 0
    FETCH NEXT FROM MY_CURSOR INTO @CARD_TYPE , @SUB_ITEMS_REF ,@SUB_AMNT , @UNIT_PRICE , @TOTAL 
    WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0

    BEGIN 
        IF @SUB_ITEMS_REF = 0 
            SET @TOTAL_TEMP = @TOTAL_TEMP + @TOTAL 
        ELSE IF @SUB_ITEMS_REF <> 0 
        BEGIN 
			--SET @ALLTOTAL = @ALLTOTAL
			EXEC dbo.KS_RecipeCostSub @SUB_ITEMS_REF, @SUB_AMNT, @TOTAL_TEMP_2 OUTPUT
            SET @TOTAL_TEMP = @TOTAL_TEMP + @TOTAL_TEMP_2 
            --SET @ALLTOTAL = @ALLTOTAL + @TOTAL
        END;

        FETCH NEXT FROM MY_CURSOR INTO @CARD_TYPE , @SUB_ITEMS_REF ,@SUB_AMNT , @UNIT_PRICE , @TOTAL 
    END

    CLOSE MY_CURSOR
    DEALLOCATE MY_CURSOR;

    -- Fonksiyonun sonunda değeri döndür
	SET @ALLTOTAL = convert(DECIMAL(18,2),@TOTAL_TEMP)
    --RETURN 25 --@ALLTOTAL
END
